summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Edit Competition feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working for edit dialog, pre-filled values, save changes, and cancel functionality.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update competition name
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update competition description
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update start_date
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update end_date
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update min_rounds
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update multiple fields at once
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent competition
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Returns 400 for empty payload
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Preserves unchanged fields
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Update status field
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Handle null dates
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - Empty string description
Backend: PUT /api/competitions/{id} - min_rounds boundary values (1-52)
Frontend: Edit button visible on competition cards
Frontend: Click Edit opens dialog with pre-filled values
Frontend: Edit dialog shows all fields (name, description, dates, min_rounds)
Frontend: Name input pre-filled with current competition name
Frontend: Description input pre-filled (empty if no description)
Frontend: Min rounds input pre-filled with current value
Frontend: Date inputs use DD/MM/YYYY format with calendar picker
Frontend: Save Changes button updates competition via PUT API
Frontend: Competition card reflects updated values after save
Frontend: Success toast 'Competition updated!' displayed after save
Frontend: Cancel button closes dialog without saving changes
critical_code_review_comments: Backend PUT /api/competitions/{id} endpoint properly validates empty payload (returns 400)
Backend correctly preserves unchanged fields when partial update is sent
Frontend Edit dialog correctly pre-fills all existing competition data
Frontend properly formats dates in DD/MM/YYYY format for display and yyyy-MM-dd for API
Frontend Cancel button correctly discards changes without API call
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)

seed_data_creation: Test competitions created during pytest run were cleaned up automatically via fixture teardown. UI test modified 'Summer Championship 2026' competition and restored it after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Competition feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint: PUT /api/competitions/{id} accepts CompetitionUpdate model with optional fields (name, description, status, start_date, end_date, min_rounds). Frontend: Edit button on competition cards opens Edit Competition dialog with pre-filled values. Save Changes calls PUT API and refreshes list. Cancel closes dialog without saving. Test competition 'Summer Championship 2026' exists in Test Golf Society.
